name: daysInYear
description: Determines the number of days in a year.

coldfusion.notes: Member function is available in CF11+.

lucee.notes: Lucee allows an optional `timezone` parameter. Member function is available in Lucee4.5+.

examples.title: Simple example
examples.description: Uses the daysInYear function to determine the number of days in a year.

examples.title: Simple example with leap year
examples.description: Uses the daysInYear function to determine the number of days in a leap year.

examples.title: Member Function Example
examples.description: Uses the `daysInYear() member function to determine the number of days in a given month.

examples.title: Chainable Member Function Example
examples.description: The `daysInYear() member function can be chained to another function.

examples.title: Lucee Example with Timezone Argument
examples.description: Use caution when using Lucee's `timezone` argument. Because of the way Lucee impliments `timezone` in date calculations, this attribute may cause unexpected behavior.
examples.code:
/* Run on Lucee */
d1=createDate(2016,1,1) /* LEAP YEAR */;d2=createDate(2016,1,2) /* LEAP YEAR */;writeOutput( d1.daysInYear('CST') & " | " & d2.daysInYear('CST') );
